Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to provide up-to-date content for email generation.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's inventory database for all parts that match the submitted vehicle spec, returning both stocked items and gaps where no matching part exists.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls a precise, real-time snapshot of DFC's coverage for that vehicle, replacing manual catalog searches that could take an hour or more.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the Dream inventory results into a clean, formatted Excel-ready layout, clearly distinguishing what DFC stocks versus what is missing for the vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates the manual formatting work of building a catalog file, delivering a professional output Mark can use immediately for sales or sourcing decisions.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, along with a brief summary of what was found and what gaps were flagged.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of his form submission, turning a multi-hour manual task into an instant result.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, on-order quantities, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent lookups by centralizing all live inventory data in one automated pull, saving hours of redundant manual work each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each backorder line with the live Dream inventory data, flags any parts that have no on-hand, no on-order, and no in-transit status as dead-end items with no resolution path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable status report with dead-end flags clearly marked, so the team knows exactly which parts need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder lines, notifying customers of delays or dead-end parts with pre-written, ready-to-review messages.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time to communicate backorder status to customers from days of manual outreach to an automated draft ready for same-day review and send.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract all two-piece rotor listings with their associated make, model, and year fitment data.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in minutes instead of days of manual catalog review across three separate supplier sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify overlaps and gaps in DFC's current coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC is missing coverage that competitors offer, giving Dino a clear picture of product development or sourcing opportunities.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers to gather demand data on specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Turns passive catalog gaps into active demand intelligence by collecting real customer interest data to prioritize which fitments DFC should add first.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, DFC cross-reference results, and collected customer demand responses into one formatted, filterable output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single source of truth for two-piece rotor coverage and demand that Dino can use immediately for strategic product decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creative, extracting the full ad copy text from every active ad including headlines, primary text, and descriptions.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly surfaces all live ad copy across both platforms in one pull, replacing the need to manually open and review each ad in two separate ad managers.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every extracted ad copy field for the specified target phrases, flagging each exact match with the ad ID, platform, field name, and the specific copy string where the phrase appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds with surgical precision, eliminating the risk of human review missing a match.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report email listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy snippet where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an audit-ready findings list directly to the requester's inbox so problematic copy can be reviewed and pulled immediately without navigating either ad platform.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 55 total agents across the board — 27 completed, 11 in progress, and 17 planned. There were no new agents added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, our completed agents continue running daily, weekly, and monthly workflows that drive real impact across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, SEO, and operations. The team should feel great about how much of our marketing infrastructure is now running on autopilot — and there's plenty more in the pipeline to look forward to!
